titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 5945

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=800 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 13:36:57.954653+00 | translation moa=801 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 13:36:57.964856+00

p.cl: Omnibus Christi fidelibus ad quos presens scriptum peruenerit  Robertus filius Reginaldi Salutem .

me diuine pietatis intuitu et pro anima patris mei et omnium antecessorum meorum . et pro salute anime mee et preci
pue pro anima Nicholay filii Ade cuius mors michi imponebatur  dedise . concessisse . et hac carta mea confirmasse . In
puram . liberam . et pereptuam elemosinam . deo et sancte Marie et priori et monachis de Coldingham ibidem deo ser
uientibus et in perpetuum seruituris . tresdecim acras et unam Rodam in territorio Magne Ristone in tribus locis .
scilicet in Bilyeside et Sonƿiwesacre et in Holewaye . habendas et tenendas in perpetuam adeo libere . quiete .
plenarie . et honorifice sicut aliqua elemosina in regno Scotie . liberius . quietius . plenarius et honorificentius
tenetur uel possidetur . Ego autem Robertus et heredes mei dictas tresdecim acras et vnam rodam dictis priori et mo
nachis contra omnes homines et feminas warantizabimus . Et in omnibus seruiciis et auxiliis tam uersus dominum
regem quam domum de Coldingham defendemus et acquietabimus .

Hiis testibus . Domino Willelmo de Lindeseia . Domino
Willelmo de Morthintona . Domino Alano de Swintona . Domino Ada de Prendergest . Roberto . Alexandro . Willelmo de Paxtona . Willelmo
clerico domini prioris . Iohanne filio Elye de Aytona . Mauricio de Aytona . Bertramo de Restona . Roberto filio Gregorii
Radulfo preposito . Rogero filio eius . Et multis aliis .
To all Christ's faithful to whom the present writing shall have come, Robert son of Reginald sends greeting.

moved by divine love and for the soul of my father and of all my ancestors, and for the salvation of my own soul, and especially for the soul of Nicholas, son of Adam, whose death has been attributed to me, to have given, granted, and made firm by this my charter, in pure, free, and everlasting alms, to God, Saint Mary, to the prior, and to the monks of Coldingham serving God in that place now and for ever in the future, thirteen acres and one rood in the territory of Great Reston in three places; that is, in Billieside and Sonƿiwesacre and in Holewaye; to have and to hold for ever, as freely, quitely, fully, and honourably as any alms in the kingdom of Scotland is freely, quitely, fully, and honourably held or possessed. And I, Robert, and my heir, shall warrant the said thirteen acres and one rood to the said prior and monks against all men and women; and we shall defend and acquit them in all services and aids, both towards the lord king and also the house of Coldingham.

With these witnesses: the lord William of Lindsay; the lord William of Mordington; the lord Alan of Swinton; the lord Adam of Prenderguest; Robert, Alexander, William of Paxton; William, clerk of the lord prior; John son of Elias of Ayton; Maurice of Ayton; Bertram of Reston; Robert son of Gregory; Ralph the grieve; Roger his son; and many others.
